name: AI in Education
description: Research on intelligent technologies, learning systems, automation, and human-AI interaction in educational settings.
description_zh: 研究教育场景中的智能技术、学习系统、自动化机制与人机协同互动。
subfields_zh: AI 支持的自我调节学习
生成式 AI 教学法

name: Learning Sciences
description: Interdisciplinary research on how people learn across classrooms, digital environments, and social contexts.
description_zh: 跨学科研究学习者如何在课堂、数字环境和社会情境中学习。

name: Educational Psychology
description: Study of motivation, cognition, emotion, identity, and individual differences in learning.
description_zh: 研究学习中的动机、认知、情绪、身份认同与个体差异。

name: Higher Education Studies
description: Research on universities, graduate education, student experience, academic work, and institutional change.
description_zh: 研究大学、研究生教育、学生体验、学术工作与院校变革。

name: Education Policy
description: Analysis of education governance, reform, equity, accountability, and policy implementation.
description_zh: 分析教育治理、改革、公平、问责与政策执行。

name: Curriculum & Instruction
description: Inquiry into curriculum design, pedagogy, classroom practice, and instructional improvement.
description_zh: 探究课程设计、教学法、课堂实践与教学改进。

name: Digital Education
description: Study of online learning, educational technology, hybrid learning, and digital transformation.
description_zh: 研究在线学习、教育技术、混合式学习与数字化转型。

name: Sociology of Education
description: Research on education, inequality, social mobility, culture, family, and institutional stratification.
description_zh: 研究教育、不平等、社会流动、文化、家庭与制度分层。

name: Assessment & Evaluation
description: Research on measurement, formative assessment, program evaluation, and evidence use.
description_zh: 研究教育测量、形成性评价、项目评估与证据使用。

name: Teacher Education
description: Research on teacher learning, professional development, teacher identity, and classroom expertise.
description_zh: 研究教师学习、专业发展、教师身份与课堂专业能力。

name: Special Education
description: Research on inclusive education, disability studies, intervention, accessibility, and learner support.
description_zh: 研究融合教育、残障研究、干预、无障碍与学习者支持。

name: Philosophy of Education
description: Philosophical inquiry into educational aims, ethics, knowledge, values, and democratic education.
description_zh: 从哲学角度探究教育目的、伦理、知识、价值与民主教育。
